name: La Soufrière
location: Caribbean, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines
eruptionHistory: Major eruption in April 2021 forced evacuation of 20,000 people. Previous eruptions in 1979, 1902 (killed 1,680 people), and 1812.
description: La Soufrière's 2021 eruption was its first explosive eruption in over 40 years. The 1902 eruption killed nearly 1,700 people, occurring the same day as the Pelee eruption on Martinique.
